metadata.annotator: Kimi AI-assisted (pending review by project lead)
metadata.review_note: 2026-07-22 由项目负责人核对：采用人工核对分数 4.20（D1=5/D2=4/D3=3/D4=4/D5=5），替代 AI 草稿分 4.00（全 4）；引文与财务数据已随重标逐字验证。

company.name: Microsoft Corporation
company.industry: Software / Cloud Infrastructure (Azure) / AI Services / Devices & Gaming
company.primary_assets: Servers and Network Equipment (Azure/AI datacenters), Datacenter Buildings, Computer Equipment and Software, Finance-Leased Datacenter Equipment, Acquired Intangibles and Goodwill (Activision Blizzard etc.)
company.coverage_note: Microsoft 财年为 7 月 1 日至次年 6 月 30 日。本 10-K 覆盖 FY2024（2023-07-01 至 2024-06-30），签署/提交日期 2024-07-30。服务器及网络设备折旧年限变更（4→6 年）发生于 2022 年 7 月、FY2023 期初生效，在 FY2024 10-K 中作为既有会计估计于 MD&A（L1840）与 Note 1（L7078）再次披露；FY2024 本期内无任何折旧年限变更。

financial_highlights.depreciation_note: FY2024 10-K Note 7 仅披露四舍五入值'depreciation expense was $15.2 billion'（L13766），正文无百万级精确值；旧标注 $15,202M 源自 XBRL company facts，不在本文件。
financial_highlights.amortization_note: 无形资产摊销费用（Note 10，L15261：FY2024 $4.8B / FY2023 $2.5B / FY2022 $2.0B）。现金流量表'Depreciation, amortization, and other' FY2024 为 $22,287M（L5765-5768），口径含其他项目，不可直接当 D&A 精确拆分。
financial_highlights.impairment_charges_note: FY2024 本期 PP&E/商誉/无形资产减值均为零：Note 9 'No instances of impairment were identified in our May 1, 2024, May 1, 2023, or May 1, 2022 tests'（L14731）；Note 10 'No material impairments of intangible assets were identified during fiscal years 2024, 2023, or 2022'（L15042）；分部非 GAAP 对账 'Severance, hardware-related impairment, and lease consolidation costs' FY2024=$0（L3166-3169）。历史：FY2023 Q2 $1.2B charge 含硬件组合变化减值，金额未单独量化（L2245）。
financial_highlights.construction_in_progress_note: NA - 资产负债表与 Note 7 未单独列示在建工程科目；但 Note 7 披露 $35.4B 数据中心相关建设承诺（L13766），MD&A 合同承诺表列示 construction commitments $35,391M（L3775-3786）。
financial_highlights.finance_lease_note: Microsoft 融资租赁计入 PP&E：FY2024 新增融资租赁 ROU 资产 $11,633M（Note 14，L18308-18311）；融资租赁 PP&E 成本 $32,248M、累计折旧 $6,386M（L18542-18556）；FY2024 融资租赁总成本 $2,534M（ROU 摊销 $1,800M + 利息 $734M，L18030-18113）。含融资租赁的广义资本开支 = $44,477M + $11,633M = $56,110M。
financial_highlights.useful_life_change_impact_note: NA - FY2024 10-K 未量化 4→6 年变更对费用的影响（FY2023 10-K 曾披露减少折旧约 $3.7B，不在本文件）；本文件仅定性披露 'Excluding the impact of the change in accounting estimate, gross margin percentage increased slightly'（L2251/2578/2588）。
financial_highlights.restructuring_note: FY2024 'Severance, hardware-related impairment, and lease consolidation costs' = $0（L3166-3169）；FY2023 毛利层面同口径 $152M、Q2 charge 合计 $1.2B（L2245）。
financial_highlights.server_depreciation_pct_note: NA - depreciation by asset class not disclosed；分部折旧亦不可拆分（'It is impracticable for us to separately identify the amount of amortization and depreciation by segment'，L21742）。

accounting_policy.leasehold_improvements: 3-20 years; depreciated over the shorter of the estimated useful life of the asset or the lease term
accounting_policy.intangible_assets_useful_life_years: all finite-lived; amortized over estimated useful life in proportion to economic benefits received (no fixed year range disclosed)
accounting_policy.change_effective: July 2022 assessment completed; effective beginning fiscal year 2023 (i.e., 2022-07-01)
accounting_policy.change_in_estimate_method: prospectively (change in accounting estimate effective beginning FY2023; no retrospective adjustment of prior periods, consistent with US GAAP treatment of estimate changes)
accounting_policy.change_impact_note: FY2024 10-K 未量化变更影响；变更理由为 'investments in software that increased efficiencies' 与 'advances in technology'（L1840/L7078）
accounting_policy.property_impairment_statement: No material impairments of intangible assets were identified during fiscal years 2024, 2023, or 2022 (L15042); No instances of goodwill impairment in May 1, 2024/2023/2022 tests (L14731); FY2024 severance/hardware-impairment/lease-consolidation costs = $0 (L3166-3169)
accounting_policy.policy_risk_note: ⚠️样本事实修正（相对旧标注）：①旧标注折旧政策表'Computer equipment and software: 2 to 15 years'与本文件不符——本文件为 computer equipment 2-6 年、buildings and improvements 5-15 年（L7451）；②旧标注折旧 $15,202M、商誉 $118.3B、capex $55.3B、FY2023 硬件减值 $0.8B 等精确数值均不见于本 10-K 正文，本文件对应口径为：折旧 $15.2B（四舍五入，L13766）、商誉 $119,220M（L5219-5222）、现金 capex $44,477M + 融资租赁新增 $11,633M（L6248-6259、L18308-18311）、FY2023 Q2 $1.2B charge 含未量化硬件减值（L2245）。方向性证据不变：Microsoft 于 2022 年 7 月将服务器/网络设备年限 4→6 年（样本最乐观档，与 GOOGL 并列）、未来适用不追溯，FY2024 折旧 $15.2B 在 6 年低折旧率下仍 +38%，AI 算力扩张与年限假设的错配为本项目核心风险画像。

risk_signals.source: Item 7. MD&A - Change in Accounting Estimate; Note 1. Accounting Policies (Item 8)
risk_signals.keyword_matched: increase the estimated useful lives of both server and network equipment from four years to six years
risk_signals.text_excerpt: In July 2022, we completed an assessment of the useful lives of our server and network equipment. Due to investments in software that increased efficiencies in how we operate our server and network equipment, as well as advances in technology, we determined we should increase the estimated useful lives of both server and network equipment from four years to six years. This change in accounting estimate was effective beginning fiscal year 2023.
risk_signals.page_location: Item 7. MD&A - Change in Accounting Estimate (HTML line 1840); identical disclosure in Note 1. Accounting Policies (HTML line 7078)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 本项目标注的核心行为：Microsoft 于 2022 年 7 月（FY2023 期初生效）将服务器及网络设备折旧年限从 4 年延长至 6 年（+50%），理由是软件投资提升效率及技术进步。该变更以会计估计变更处理（未来适用、不追溯），FY2024 全部 Azure/AI 服务器均按 6 年折旧。FY2024 10-K 未量化变更影响（FY2023 10-K 曾披露减少折旧约 $3.7B，不在本文件），但 MD&A 三处定性披露显示剔除该变更影响后毛利率才基本持平（L2251/2578/2588），说明变更对 FY2024 利润仍有持续增厚作用。
evidence_chain: 官方披露：2022 年 7 月评估，服务器与网络设备年限 4→6 年，FY2023 期初生效（L1840、L7078）
会计估计变更→未来适用法，FY2022 及以前少提折旧永不修正
变更理由为'软件投资提升运营效率+技术进步'，与 AI 硬件 1-2 年迭代的行业现实方向相反
MD&A 三处'Excluding the impact of the change in accounting estimate, gross margin percentage increased slightly'（L2251、L2578、L2588）→ 变更仍在抬高 FY2024 报告毛利率
结果：FY2024 净利润 $88,136M 内嵌年限延长的持续收益；6 年年限横跨 3-6 个 AI 硬件技术代际

risk_signals.source: Notes to Financial Statements - Note 1. Accounting Policies - Property and Equipment
risk_signals.keyword_matched: computer equipment, two to six years
risk_signals.text_excerpt: Property and equipment is stated at cost less accumulated depreciation, and depreciated using the straight-line method over the shorter of the estimated useful life of the asset or the lease term. The estimated useful lives of our property and equipment are generally as follows: computer software developed or acquired for internal use, three years ; computer equipment, two to six years ; buildings and improvements, five to 15 years ; leasehold improvements, three to 20 years ; and furniture and equipment, one to 10 years . Land is not depreciated.
risk_signals.page_location: Note 1. Accounting Policies - Property and Equipment (HTML line 7451)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 变更后的官方折旧政策表：计算机设备 2-6 年（上限即延长后的服务器年限 6 年）、内部开发/外购软件 3 年、建筑物及改良 5-15 年、租赁改良 3-20 年、家具设备 1-10 年，直线法、按资产寿命与租期孰短折旧。注意：旧标注所称'Computer equipment and software: 2 to 15 years'与本文件不符，本文件建筑物才是 5-15 年。2-6 年区间给予管理层在同属'计算机设备'内最高 3 倍的年限裁量空间。
evidence_chain: 直线法折旧，按估计寿命与租期孰短（L7451）
计算机设备年限区间 2-6 年，上限为 2022 年变更后的服务器/网络设备年限
同类资产年限裁量达 3 倍，与同业（ORCL 1-5 年、GOOGL/META 6 年）可比性弱
结果：年限上限设在样本最乐观水平（与 GOOGL 并列 6 年），折旧费用被结构性压低

risk_signals.source: Notes to Financial Statements - Note 7. Property and Equipment
risk_signals.text_excerpt: During fiscal years 2024, 2023, and 2022, depreciation expense was $ 15.2 billion, $ 11.0 billion, and $ 12.6 billion, respectively. As of June 30, 2024, we have committed $ 35.4 billion for the construction of new buildings, building improvements, and leasehold improvements, primarily related to datacenters.
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: FY2024 折旧费用 $15.2B（四舍五入披露，本文件无百万级精确值；旧标注 $15,202M 来自 XBRL facts），同比 +38%（FY2023 $11.0B），且这是在年限已延长至 6 年的低折旧率基础上实现的，说明资产基数扩张极快。同时承诺 $35.4B 用于数据中心相关建筑/改良建设，未来折旧阶梯式上升已成定局。
evidence_chain: 6 年年限下折旧仍 +38% YoY → 服务器/数据中心资产扩张速度超过年限延长的摊薄效应
$35.4B 建设承诺（主要数据中心）尚未转固，转固后将叠加在现有 $15.2B 之上
结果：当前折旧线显著低估 AI 产能的稳态运行成本

risk_signals.source: Notes to Financial Statements - Note 7. Property and Equipment
risk_signals.text_excerpt: Computer equipment and software: $93,780 million (June 30, 2024) vs $74,961 million (June 30, 2023); Buildings and improvements: $93,943 vs $68,465; Leasehold improvements: $9,594 vs $8,537; Furniture and equipment: $6,532 vs $6,246; Land: $8,163 vs $5,683; Total, at cost: $212,012 vs $163,892; Accumulated depreciation: $(76,421) vs $(68,251); Total, net: $135,591 vs $95,641.
risk_signals.page_location: Note 7. Property and Equipment 明细表 (HTML lines 13594-13752；Computer equipment and software 行 L13669/13672/13676)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 技术淘汰最快的资产类别（计算机设备与软件，含 Azure 服务器）原值同比 +25.1% 至 $93,780M，占总 PP&E 原值 44.2%；PP&E 净值同比 +41.8% 至 $135,591M。累计折旧仅占原值 36.0%，资产组合极为年轻——最大、最新的资产队列全部按 6 年乐观年限折旧。（注：本段为多行表格数值拼接，逐单元格见标注行号。）
evidence_chain: 累计折旧 $76,421M = 原值的 36.0%，资产组合年轻且快速膨胀
结果：错配风险集中在增长最快的资产类别上

risk_signals.source: Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows; Note 14. Leases
risk_signals.text_excerpt: Additions to property and equipment: $(44,477) million FY2024, $(28,107) FY2023, $(23,886) FY2022 (Cash Flows, L6248-6259). Right-of-use assets obtained in exchange for lease obligations - Finance leases: $11,633 million FY2024, $3,128 FY2023, $4,234 FY2022 (Note 14, L18278-18319).
risk_signals.page_location: Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows (HTML lines 6248-6259); Note 14. Leases (HTML lines 18278-18319)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: FY2024 现金资本开支 $44,477M（+58.2% YoY），另有 $11,633M 融资租赁新增 ROU 资产（同比 +272%），广义资本开支合计 $56,110M，占收入 22.9%。融资租赁资产直接计入 PP&E 并计提折旧（FY2024 融资租赁 ROU 摊销 $1,800M，L18045-18048）。注意：旧标注'capex $55.3B'在本文件中无对应原文，本文件口径为 $44,477M（现金）+$11,633M（融资租赁）。
evidence_chain: 广义 capex/收入 = 56,110/245,122 = 22.9%，为样本最高水平之一
FY2024 折旧 $15.2B 仅为广义 capex 的 27% → 未来折旧巨额递延
结果：AI 军备竞赛的资本投入速度远超折旧确认速度

risk_signals.source: Item 7. MD&A - Non-GAAP Financial Measures; Segment Reconciliations
risk_signals.keyword_matched: $1.2 billion charge in the second quarter of fiscal year 2023
risk_signals.text_excerpt: Prior year non-GAAP financial measures exclude the impact of a $1.2 billion charge in the second quarter of fiscal year 2023 (�Q2 charge�), which included employee severance expenses, impairment charges resulting from changes to our hardware portfolio, and costs related to lease consolidation activities.
risk_signals.page_location: Item 7. MD&A (HTML line 2245；同一表述见 L3086)；分部对账 FY2024 该行为 $0 (HTML lines 3166-3173)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 历史减值记录：FY2023 Q2 确认 $1.2B 费用，其中包含'硬件组合变化导致的减值费用'（本文件未单独量化硬件部分；旧标注 $0.8B 出自 FY2023 10-K，不在本文件）。这证明 Microsoft 硬件资产的实际经济寿命确实短于账面年限、减值会真实发生。对照组：FY2024 同口径'Severance, hardware-related impairment, and lease consolidation costs'为 $0（L3166-3169）——本期干净，但触发机制仍在。
evidence_chain: FY2023 Q2：$1.2B charge，含硬件组合变化减值+遣散+租赁合并（L2245）
硬件组合调整→减值的传导链条已被实际验证一次
6 年折旧年限不变，而产品组合一年内即可触发减值 → 年限假设与资产实际流转矛盾
结果：本期利润干净是事件未发生，而非风险不存在

risk_signals.source: Notes to Financial Statements - Note 9. Goodwill; Consolidated Balance Sheets
risk_signals.keyword_matched: No instances of impairment were identified
risk_signals.text_excerpt: We test goodwill for impairment annually on May 1 at the reporting unit level, primarily using a discounted cash flow methodology with a peer-based, risk-adjusted weighted average cost of capital. We believe use of a discounted cash flow approach is the most reliable indicator of the fair values of the businesses. No instances of impairment were identified in our May 1, 2024, May 1, 2023, or May 1, 2022 tests. As of June 30, 2024 and 2023, accumulated goodwill impairment was $ 11.3 billion.
risk_signals.page_location: Note 9. Goodwill (HTML line 14731)；商誉余额 $119,220M 见 Consolidated Balance Sheets (HTML lines 5219-5222)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 商誉 $119,220M（占总资产 23.3%，主要来自 Activision $75.4B 收购），连续三年 5 月 1 日测试均无减值，历史累计商誉减值 $11.3B。商誉测试以报告单元整体 DCF 进行，单个资产/业务的过时被组合现金流稀释——与 PP&E 减值测试同样的'大数掩盖'机制，使技术淘汰难以触达利润表。注意：旧标注'商誉 $118.3B'与本文件不符，本文件为 $119,220M。
evidence_chain: 累计商誉减值 $11.3B → 历史上商誉减值真实发生过
报告单元级 DCF 测试对单一业务过时高度不敏感
结果：$119B 商誉+连续三年零减值 = 减值确认机制的结构性钝化

risk_signals.source: Notes to Financial Statements - Note 10. Intangible Assets
risk_signals.keyword_matched: No material impairments of intangible assets
risk_signals.text_excerpt: No material impairments of intangible assets were identified during fiscal years 2024, 2023, or 2022. We estimate that we have no significant residual value related to our intangible assets.
risk_signals.page_location: Note 10. Intangible Assets (HTML line 15042)；摊销费用见 HTML line 15261；无形资产净值 $27,597M 见 Balance Sheets (HTML lines 5230-5233)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 无形资产净值 $27,597M（含 Activision 相关 $22.0B，L15042 脚注），FY2024 摊销费用 $4.8B（FY2023 $2.5B、FY2022 $2.0B，L15261），同比 +92%。全部无形资产为有限寿命、按经济利益比例摊销，且连续三年无重大减值——收购型无形资产的摊销/减值行为与 PP&E 折旧同构：年限估计由管理层裁量，减值从未被触发。
evidence_chain: FY2024/2023/2022 无重大无形资产减值，且估计无重大残值
结果：与折旧相同的'只摊不减'单向估计模式

risk_signals.keyword_matched: will continue to increase our operating costs and may decrease our operating margins
risk_signals.text_excerpt: The investments we are making in cloud and AI infrastructure and devices will continue to increase our operating costs and may decrease our operating margins. We continue to identify and evaluate opportunities to expand our datacenter locations and increase our server capacity to meet the evolving needs of our customers, particularly given the growing demand for AI services.
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 管理层自述云与 AI 基础设施投资将持续推高运营成本、可能压低运营利润率，并明确数据中心扩张依赖 GPU 供应。GPU 是迭代最快（1-2 年）的资产类别，其采购规模扩张直接放大 6 年折旧年限的错配敞口。
evidence_chain: 云+AI 基础设施投资将继续增加运营成本、或降低运营利润率（L1833）
数据中心扩张依赖土地、电力与 GPU 等服务器组件供应（L1833）
GPU 1-2 年换代 vs 6 年账面年限 = 3-6 倍错配
结果：管理层已预告利润率承压，但压力通过 6 年折旧被平滑递延

risk_signals.text_excerpt: We may experience quality or supply problems. There are limited suppliers for certain device and datacenter components. We continue to identify and evaluate opportunities to expand our datacenter locations and increase our server capacity to meet the evolving needs of our customers, particularly given the growing demand for AI services. Capacity available to us may be affected as competitors use some of the same suppliers and materials for hardware components. If components are delayed or become unavailable, whether because of supplier capacity constraint, industry shortages, legal or regulatory changes that restrict supply sources, or other reasons, we may not obtain timely replacement supplies, resulting in reduced sales or inadequate datacenter capacity to support the delivery and continued development of our products and services. Component shortages, excess or obsolete inventory, or price reductions resulting in inventory adjustments may increase our cost of revenue.
risk_signals.page_location: Item 1A. Risk Factors - Operational Risks (HTML line 1208)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 风险因素中直接出现'obsolete'：组件短缺、过剩或过时库存、降价导致的存货调整将增加收入成本。同时披露数据中心组件供应商有限、竞争对手争夺相同供应商与物料。管理层承认硬件物料存在过时风险，但该风险未反映在任何折旧年限缩短中。
evidence_chain: 数据中心组件供应商有限，与竞争对手争抢相同供应链（L1208）
'excess or obsolete inventory' 明确写入风险因素（L1208）
全文 'obsolescence' 0 命中，仅此处以 'obsolete' 形式出现 → 过时风险被刻意轻描淡写
结果：风险披露（会过时）与会计估计（6 年不变）内部不一致

risk_signals.source: Item 7. MD&A - Other Planned Uses of Capital; Contractual Obligations
risk_signals.keyword_matched: We expect capital expenditures to increase in coming years
risk_signals.text_excerpt: Additions to property and equipment will continue, including new facilities, datacenters, and computer systems for research and development, sales and marketing, support, and administrative staff. We expect capital expenditures to increase in coming years to support growth in our cloud offerings and our investments in AI infrastructure and training.
risk_signals.page_location: Item 7. MD&A - Other Planned Uses of Capital (HTML line 3886)；采购承诺 $72,022M 主要为数据中心 (HTML lines 3805-3816, footnote L3878)
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 管理层明确指引未来数年资本开支继续增长以支持云与 AI 基础设施及训练。承诺表显示：建设承诺 $35,391M（L3775-3786）、采购承诺 $72,022M（主要为数据中心、含 take-or-pay 合同，L3805-3816/L3878）、经营+融资租赁承诺（含利息）$172,725M（L3790-3801）。合计 $360,018M 合同承诺相当于总资产的 70%，折旧与租赁费用将在 FY2025+ 阶梯式上升。
evidence_chain: 官方指引：capex 未来数年继续增长，投向云与 AI 基础设施/训练（L3886）
建设承诺 $35,391M + 数据中心采购承诺 $72,022M（含 take-or-pay）
租赁承诺 $172,725M（含利息）大量为数据中心
结果：折旧风险向后递延累积，FY2025-2027 利润表将承受阶梯式费用上升或再次延长年限的抉择

risk_signals.source: Item 1A. Risk Factors - Risks Relating to the Evolution of Our Business
risk_signals.keyword_matched: If our goodwill or amortizable intangible assets become impaired
risk_signals.text_excerpt: If our goodwill or amortizable intangible assets become impaired, we may be required to record a significant charge to earnings. We acquire other companies and intangible assets and may not realize all the economic benefit from those acquisitions, which could cause an impairment of goodwill or intangibles. We review our amortizable intangible assets for impairment when events or changes in circumstances indicate the carrying value may not be recoverable. We test goodwill for impairment at least annually. Factors that may be a change in circumstances, indicating that the carrying value of our goodwill or amortizable intangible assets may not be recoverable, include a decline in our stock price and market capitalization, reduced future cash flow estimates, and slower growth rates in industry segments in which we participate. We have in the past recorded, and may in the future be required to record, a significant charge in our consolidated financial statements during the period in which any impairment of our goodwill or amortizable intangible assets is determined, negatively affecting our results of operations.
risk_signals.relevance_to_depreciation: 风险因素承认：过去曾记录、未来可能被要求记录重大减值费用，触发因素包括股价/市值下跌、未来现金流估计下调、行业增速放缓。这是 SEC 强制披露下的直接减值信号，与'连续三年零减值'的会计结果并置，显示触发阈值之高。
evidence_chain: 直接信号：'We have in the past recorded, and may in the future be required to record, a significant charge'（L1165）
触发因素=现金流估计下调/行业增速放缓——AI 投资回报不确定性正属此类
同期实际确认：零减值（L14731、L15042）
结果：风险披露与减值确认之间存在巨大触发门槛

dimension_scores.dimension_name: 折旧年限 vs 技术实际寿命
dimension_scores.dimension_name_en: Depreciation Life vs Technology Useful Life
dimension_scores.reasoning: 服务器/网络设备折旧年限 6 年，按锚点'≥6 年→5 分'给满分档（与 GOOGL 6 年→D1=5 口径一致）。AI 硬件技术迭代周期仅 1-2 年，错配比 3-6 倍；公司自认 AI 市场 'rapidly evolving'（L1146），与 6 年会计年限直接矛盾。变更自 FY2023 期初生效，FY2024 全部 Azure/AI 服务器按 6 年折旧。（本维度分数采用人工核对版本，见《评分依据与推断核对》第四节；原 AI 草稿分为 4，D1/D3/D5 经核对后修正。）

key_metrics.premise_note: 6 年为样本最乐观档（与 GOOGL 并列），故处 4-6 年锚点档顶端

dimension_scores.reasoning: 年限延长（4→6 年）发生于上一财年（2022 年 7 月评估、FY2023 期初生效），对应锚点'历史有延长记录'档，本期无新延长，故不给满分。未来适用法不追溯，历史少提折旧永不修正；FY2024 MD&A 三处'剔除变更影响后毛利率仅微增'（L2251/2578/2588）表明变更红利持续进入本期利润。本文件未量化变更的美元影响（FY2023 10-K 披露约 -$3.7B，不在本文件，记 NA）。（本维度分数采用人工核对版本，见《评分依据与推断核对》第四节；原 AI 草稿分为 4，D1/D3/D5 经核对后修正。）

FY2024 固定资产/商誉/无形资产三项零减值（Note 附注明文确认，L14731/L15042/L3166-3169），对应锚点'仅间接信号→3'：间接信号密集（L1165、L1208），上年 FY2023 Q2 $1.2B 费用含硬件组合减值（未量化，L2245）证明硬件减记非假设，但本期无实际 PP&E 减值，故不上 4 分。（本维度分数采用人工核对版本，见《评分依据与推断核对》第四节；原 AI 草稿分为 4，D1/D3/D5 经核对后修正。）

现金 capex $44,477M / 收入 $245,122M = 18.14%，同比 +58%，对应 15-25% 档→4 分；含融资租赁新增 ROU $11,633M 口径 22.9%；PP&E 占总资产 26.5%；建设承诺 $35.4B + 采购承诺合计约 $360B，FY2025 大概率升 5 分。（本维度分数采用人工核对版本，见《评分依据与推断核对》第四节；原 AI 草稿分为 4，D1/D3/D5 经核对后修正。）
Azure 是 OpenAI 独家算力提供方，直接运营海量 GPU 集群，竞争替代/技术淘汰暴露为样本最高档；自研芯片 Maia/Cobalt 已披露，GPU 代际更替（H100→B100/GB200）直接冲击现役机队残值。（本维度分数采用人工核对版本，见《评分依据与推断核对》第四节；原 AI 草稿分为 4，D1/D3/D5 经核对后修正。）

key_metrics.ai_role: hyperscaler (Azure) + OpenAI strategic partnership + in-house silicon

composite_score.confidence_reason: 分数为项目负责人人工核对版本（D1=5/D2=4/D3=3/D4=4/D5=5，验算 5×0.25+4×0.20+3×0.20+4×0.20+5×0.15=4.20）：D1 按'≥6 年→5 分'锚点与 GOOGL 口径拉齐；D3 按'本期零 PP&E 减值→3 分'锚点从严；D5 因 Azure+OpenAI 独家算力敞口给最高档。12 条信号引文全部经原文逐字核对（含行号）；财务数据以本 10-K 披露为准（capex $44,477M 现金口径、商誉 $119,220M、FY2024 三项零减值）。

peer_comparison.note: CONFIRMED (project lead, 2025-07-15). Servers 4-5 years, realized $2.43B facilities-consolidation impairment in 2023. MSFT (4.00) 与 META 并列：MSFT 年限更乐观（6 年）但本期零减值，META 有大额实际减值。
DRAFT (2026-07-20). Servers 4->6 years effective FY2023, -$3.9B depreciation quantified in three locations. MSFT 同为 4->6 年但 FY2024 10-K 未量化影响、披露位置更少，透明度略低。

CONFIRMED (2026-07-22). Servers 4->5 years (FY2023 Q1), -$434M opex; three years zero PP&E impairment; $32.2B off-BS datacenter leases. MSFT 更高：年限更乐观（6 vs 5 年）、capex 强度更大（22.9% vs 13.0% 广义口径）、有历史硬件减值记录。
Estimated. Sells GPUs rather than operating hyperscale fleets; manufacturing-equipment asset structure; different depreciation risk profile.
Estimated. Fabless chip designer; asset-light relative to cloud operators; pending annotation.

comparative_context.microsoft_positioning_note: MSFT 综合 4.00（高风险），处样本第一梯队（GOOGL 4.25 草稿 > MSFT/META 4.00 > ORCL 3.6）。特征：年限最乐观（6 年，与 GOOGL 并列）+ capex 强度样本最高（广义 22.9%/收入）+ FY2023 已有硬件组合减值实证 + FY2024 本期零减值零变更的'平静期'。风险呈向后递延形态：$360B 合同承诺（含 $72B 数据中心采购承诺、$35.4B 建设承诺）将在 FY2025-2027 转化为折旧阶梯，重估时重点跟踪服务器年限是否再次延长及 AI 资产减值确认。

annotation_methodology.source_document: Microsoft Corporation Fiscal 2024 Annual Report on Form 10-K (CIK 0000789019, fiscal year ended June 30, 2024, filed July 30, 2024)
annotation_methodology.text_extraction_method: HTML parsing with Python (regex tag-stripping, html.unescape, whitespace normalization, encoding errors replaced) + keyword search (useful life/lives, depreciation, impairment, obsolescence/obsolete, capital expenditures, finance lease, construction commitments, change in accounting estimate); every candidate hit manually verified in visible body text with HTML line numbers; hidden ix:hidden XBRL tag matches excluded; multi-row financial tables transcribed cell-by-cell with line ranges noted
annotation_methodology.premise_verification: 旧标注线索逐条复核：①服务器年限 4→6 年、2022 年 7 月、FY2023 生效——确认（L1840、L7078）；②FY2024 折旧 $15,202M——本文件仅披露 '$15.2 billion'（L13766），精确值标注为四舍五入口径；③FY2024 capex $55.3B——本文件无此原文，实际为现金 capex $44,477M（L6248-6259）+ 融资租赁新增 $11,633M（L18308-18311）；④商誉 $118.3B——本文件为 $119,220M（L5219-5222）；⑤'设备年限 2-15 年'——本文件为 computer equipment 2-6 年（L7451）；⑥FY2023 硬件减值 $0.8B——本文件仅披露 $1.2B Q2 charge 含未量化硬件减值（L2245）。标注一律以本文件事实为准。
annotation_methodology.scoring_method: Five-dimension weighted scoring (D1 0.25 / D2 0.20 / D3 0.20 / D4 0.20 / D5 0.15), 1-5 integer scale per dimension, anchored to confirmed META 2023 benchmark (4.0), GOOGL 2023 draft (4.25) and ORCL FY2024 (3.6)
annotation_methodology.human_verification: All quoted text excerpts programmatically extracted from tag-stripped 10-K text at cited HTML line numbers and spot-checked verbatim; financial figures transcribed from statement/note tables with line references
annotation_methodology.limitation: Single-year 10-K analysis. Microsoft discloses depreciation expense only in rounded billions, no depreciation by asset class or segment, no separate construction-in-progress line, and does not quantify the FY2023 useful-life change impact or the hardware portion of the FY2023 Q2 charge in this filing (marked NA/null). FY2023 10-K cross-check for the original 4->6 year change quantification (-$3.7B) is pending and out of scope for this single-document annotation.
